intro: This archive contains 14 threat intelligence reports from a ten-day period in April 2026. The most frequently covered threat actor was LockBit. The reporting highlights a range of incidents affecting the technology, critical-infrastructure, cybersecurity, financial services, and retail sectors, with primary impacts noted across Europe, North America, and on a Global scale. The severity of these reports was varied, with six classified as high, six as informational, and one as medium.
